metadata.author: Ajay Kumar Reddy Nelavetla
metadata.description: Golden evaluation dataset for Agentic RAG Pipeline. 50 manually verified QA pairs across 5 categories.

categories.unanswerable: Answer is NOT in the documents — system should refuse
categories.multi_source: Requires information from multiple document sections
categories.ambiguous: Vague queries that need careful retrieval

test_documents.content:
Acme Corp Employee Handbook 2026.

Section 1: Company Overview
Acme Corp was founded in 2015 by Sarah Chen and Marcus Williams in Austin, Texas. The company specializes in enterprise SaaS solutions for supply chain management. As of January 2026, Acme Corp has 450 employees across 3 offices: Austin (HQ), New York, and London. Annual revenue for fiscal year 2025 was $85 million, representing 32% year-over-year growth.

Section 2: Benefits
All full-time employees receive health insurance (medical, dental, vision) starting on their first day. The company matches 401(k) contributions up to 4% of salary. Employees get 20 days of PTO per year, plus 10 company holidays. Parental leave is 16 weeks paid for all new parents regardless of gender.

Section 3: Remote Work Policy
Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week. Fully remote positions require VP approval. All employees must be available during core hours: 10am-3pm in their local timezone. Remote employees receive a $1,500 annual home office stipend.

Section 4: Performance Reviews
Performance reviews are conducted twice per year in June and December. Reviews use a 5-point scale: 1 (Needs Improvement), 2 (Meets Some Expectations), 3 (Meets Expectations), 4 (Exceeds Expectations), 5 (Outstanding). Employees rated 4 or above are eligible for promotion consideration. Annual raises are determined by performance rating and market adjustment.

Section 5: Engineering Team
The engineering team consists of 120 engineers across 8 squads. Tech stack includes Python, TypeScript, React, PostgreSQL, AWS, and Kubernetes. The team follows a 2-week sprint cycle with planning on Mondays and retrospectives on Fridays. All code changes require at least 2 peer reviews before merging. Deployment happens daily through an automated CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions.

Section 6: Security Policy
All employees must complete annual security training by March 31st each year. Two-factor authentication is mandatory for all company accounts. Laptops must have full disk encryption enabled. Any security incidents must be reported to security@acme.com within 1 hour of discovery. The company maintains SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 certifications.

Acme SupplyChain Pro — Product Documentation v3.2

Overview
SupplyChain Pro is an enterprise platform for end-to-end supply chain visibility and optimization. The platform processes over 2 million transactions daily across 500+ enterprise customers in 40 countries.

Core Features
1. Real-time Tracking: GPS and IoT sensor integration for shipment tracking with 99.7% uptime SLA.
2. Demand Forecasting: ML-powered demand prediction with 94% accuracy at 30-day horizon, using ensemble models (XGBoost + LSTM).
3. Inventory Optimization: Automated reorder point calculation that has reduced customer stockouts by 35% on average.
4. Supplier Scoring: AI-driven supplier risk assessment using 47 data points including financial health, delivery performance, and geopolitical risk.
5. Analytics Dashboard: Real-time KPI visualization with customizable reports. Supports export to PDF, Excel, and API integration.

API Reference
Base URL: https://api.acme-supply.com/v3
Authentication: Bearer token (OAuth 2.0)
Rate limits: 1000 requests/minute for Enterprise tier, 100 requests/minute for Standard tier.
Endpoints:
- GET /shipments — List all shipments (pagination supported)
- POST /shipments — Create new shipment
- GET /forecasts/{product_id} — Get demand forecast
- GET /suppliers/{id}/score — Get supplier risk score
- POST /inventory/optimize — Run inventory optimization

Pricing
Standard Plan: $2,500/month (up to 50,000 transactions)
Professional Plan: $7,500/month (up to 500,000 transactions)
Enterprise Plan: Custom pricing (unlimited transactions, dedicated support, custom SLA)
All plans include 14-day free trial. Annual billing receives 20% discount.

Integrations
SupplyChain Pro integrates with: SAP, Oracle ERP, Salesforce, NetSuite, QuickBooks, Shopify, and custom systems via REST API and webhooks. Webhook events include: shipment.created, shipment.delivered, inventory.low, forecast.updated.

Support
Standard support: Email only, 24-hour response time.
Professional support: Email + chat, 4-hour response time.
Enterprise support: 24/7 phone + email + dedicated CSM, 1-hour response time for critical issues.

Acme Corp — Q4 2025 Quarterly Report

Financial Highlights
Q4 2025 revenue was $24.2 million, up 28% from Q4 2024 ($18.9M). Full year 2025 revenue reached $85 million. Gross margin improved to 78% from 74% in the prior year. Net income for Q4 was $3.1 million. Operating expenses were $18.8 million, of which $8.2 million was R&D, $6.1 million was sales and marketing, and $4.5 million was G&A.

Customer Metrics
Total enterprise customers grew to 527, up from 412 at end of Q3. Net revenue retention rate was 118%, indicating strong expansion within existing accounts. Customer acquisition cost (CAC) decreased to $15,200 from $18,500 in Q3. Average contract value (ACV) increased to $161,000 from $148,000.

Product Updates
Launched Demand Forecasting v2 with 94% accuracy (up from 87% in v1). Shipped 47 new features across the platform. Reduced average API response time from 340ms to 210ms. Achieved 99.7% platform uptime (target: 99.5%).

Team Growth
Headcount grew from 380 to 450 employees. Engineering team expanded from 95 to 120. Opened London office in October 2025 with initial team of 25. Key hires include VP of Engineering (from Google) and Head of ML (from Meta).

Outlook for 2026
Targeting $120 million in revenue for FY2026 (41% growth). Planning to launch SupplyChain Pro v4 with AI-powered autonomous reordering in Q2 2026. Expanding into Southeast Asian market with Singapore office planned for Q3 2026. Hiring target: grow to 650 employees by end of 2026.

qa_pairs.question: When was Acme Corp founded and by whom?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Acme Corp was founded in 2015 by Sarah Chen and Marcus Williams.

qa_pairs.question: How many employees does Acme Corp have?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: As of January 2026, Acme Corp has 450 employees.

qa_pairs.question: What is the annual revenue?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Annual revenue for fiscal year 2025 was $85 million.

qa_pairs.question: How many days of PTO do employees get?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Employees get 20 days of PTO per year, plus 10 company holidays.

qa_pairs.question: What is the parental leave policy?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Parental leave is 16 weeks paid for all new parents regardless of gender.

qa_pairs.question: How many days per week can employees work remotely?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week.

qa_pairs.question: What is the home office stipend amount?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Remote employees receive a $1,500 annual home office stipend.

qa_pairs.question: What rating do employees need for promotion eligibility?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Employees rated 4 or above are eligible for promotion consideration.

qa_pairs.question: How many peer reviews are required before merging code?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: All code changes require at least 2 peer reviews before merging.

qa_pairs.question: What security certifications does Acme hold?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Acme maintains SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 certifications.

qa_pairs.question: How many transactions does SupplyChain Pro process daily?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: The platform processes over 2 million transactions daily.

qa_pairs.question: What is the demand forecasting accuracy?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: 94% accuracy at 30-day horizon.

qa_pairs.question: What ML models are used for demand forecasting?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Ensemble models using XGBoost and LSTM.

qa_pairs.question: What is the API rate limit for Enterprise tier?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: 1000 requests per minute for Enterprise tier.

qa_pairs.question: How much does the Standard plan cost?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Standard Plan costs $2,500 per month for up to 50,000 transactions.

qa_pairs.question: What was Q4 2025 revenue?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Q4 2025 revenue was $24.2 million.

qa_pairs.question: What is the net revenue retention rate?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Net revenue retention rate was 118%.

qa_pairs.question: What is the platform uptime?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: 99.7% platform uptime.

qa_pairs.question: When was the London office opened?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: The London office was opened in October 2025.

qa_pairs.question: What is the 2026 revenue target?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Targeting $120 million in revenue for FY2026.

qa_pairs.question: How much did revenue grow from Q4 2024 to Q4 2025 in dollar terms?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Revenue grew by $5.3 million, from $18.9M in Q4 2024 to $24.2M in Q4 2025.

qa_pairs.question: What percentage of Acme's employees are engineers?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: About 27% — 120 engineers out of 450 total employees.

qa_pairs.question: If I upgrade from Standard to Professional plan, how much more would I pay monthly?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: $5,000 more per month ($7,500 Professional minus $2,500 Standard).

qa_pairs.question: How many new customers did Acme add in Q4 2025?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: 115 new customers — grew from 412 at end of Q3 to 527.

qa_pairs.question: How did the engineering team size change during Q4?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Engineering grew from 95 to 120 engineers, adding 25 engineers.

qa_pairs.question: Is the demand forecasting accuracy improving?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Yes, Demand Forecasting v2 has 94% accuracy, up from 87% in v1.

qa_pairs.question: What is the average revenue per customer?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: About $161,000 per customer based on the average contract value (ACV).

qa_pairs.question: What percentage of operating expenses goes to R&D?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: About 44% — $8.2 million out of $18.8 million total operating expenses.

qa_pairs.question: How many new employees need to be hired to reach the 2026 target?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: 200 new employees — from current 450 to target 650.

qa_pairs.question: What discount do you get with annual billing on the Professional plan?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: 20% discount on annual billing.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the current CEO of Acme Corp?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: REFUSE — The documents do not mention who the current CEO is.

qa_pairs.expected_answer: REFUSE — While the tech stack is mentioned, the documents don't give hiring advice.

qa_pairs.expected_answer: REFUSE — No stock price information in the documents.

qa_pairs.expected_answer: REFUSE — No competitor information in the documents.

qa_pairs.expected_answer: REFUSE — No IPO information in the documents.

qa_pairs.expected_answer: REFUSE — Salary information is not in the documents.

qa_pairs.expected_answer: REFUSE — Restaurant recommendations are not in the documents.

qa_pairs.expected_answer: REFUSE — Cloud pricing comparison is not in the documents.

qa_pairs.expected_answer: REFUSE — Bug count information is not in the documents.

qa_pairs.expected_answer: REFUSE — Employee satisfaction data is not in the documents.

qa_pairs.question: How has the engineering team grown and what tools do they use?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Engineering grew from 95 to 120 engineers in Q4 2025. They use Python, TypeScript, React, PostgreSQL, AWS, and Kubernetes with 2-week sprints and daily deployments via GitHub Actions CI/CD.

qa_pairs.question: Tell me about the company's revenue and growth trajectory.
qa_pairs.expected_answer: FY2025 revenue was $85M with 32% YoY growth. Q4 2025 alone was $24.2M. Targeting $120M for FY2026.

qa_pairs.question: What product improvements shipped recently and what are the upcoming plans?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Shipped Demand Forecasting v2 (94% accuracy up from 87%), 47 new features, reduced API response time to 210ms. Planning SupplyChain Pro v4 with autonomous reordering for Q2 2026.

qa_pairs.question: What integrations and support options are available for enterprise customers?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Integrates with SAP, Oracle ERP, Salesforce, NetSuite, QuickBooks, Shopify. Enterprise support includes 24/7 phone + email + dedicated CSM with 1-hour response.

qa_pairs.question: What are the company's expansion plans?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Planning Singapore office in Q3 2026. Targeting 650 employees. Launching SupplyChain Pro v4 in Q2 2026.

qa_pairs.question: Tell me about the policies.
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Should cover remote work policy and/or security policy.

qa_pairs.question: How much does it cost?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Should describe pricing plans: Standard $2,500/month, Professional $7,500/month, Enterprise custom.

qa_pairs.question: What are the numbers?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Should surface key metrics like $85M revenue, 450 employees, etc.

qa_pairs.question: What can the API do?
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Should describe API endpoints: shipments, forecasts, supplier scoring, inventory optimization.

qa_pairs.question: Tell me about the team.
qa_pairs.expected_answer: Should cover 450 employees, 120 engineers in 8 squads, 3 offices.
